data.current_description: Retrieves details of a specific structure including its rooms and devices.

data.current_description: Reads the current value of a device feature (e.g., brightness, on/off state, temperature).
data.description_suggestion: Reads the current value of a specific device feature identified by featureId. Returns a FeatureValue object containing the feature's current state and metadata. Supports various feature types including brightness, on/off state, temperature, and other device-specific properties. Requires the featureId path parameter.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks explicit input/output details. Enhanced description specifies the required featureId parameter, clarifies the response structure (FeatureValue object), and provides context about supported feature types for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Sets the value of a device feature (e.g., turn on/off, set brightness level).
data.description_suggestion: Sets the value of a specific device feature identified by featureId. Accepts a FeatureSetRequest body containing the desired feature value. Requires the featureId path parameter and valid FeatureSetRequest payload.

data.current_description: Sets values for multiple device features in a single request.
data.description_suggestion: Sets values for multiple device features in a single atomic request. Accepts a BatchFeatureSetRequest body containing an array of feature updates. Returns a BatchFeatureResponse containing the results for each feature update. All features are updated immediately and may trigger related automations or events. Provides efficiency for coordinated multi-device state changes.
